name: HWPX writer

releases.author: JunDamin
releases.description:
Fourth pass on the Obsidian community plugin review (PR obsidianmd/obsidian-releases#12070).

## Policy compliance fixes
- **Sentence case**: HWPX is registered as a brand acronym in the lint config so the export button keeps its uppercase name; all other UI strings made consistent.
- **Electron isolation**: `shell.openPath` and `shell.showItemInFolder` are now centralized in `src/electronShell.ts` (gated by `Platform.isDesktopApp`); no other source file imports from `electron`.
- **Manifest**: `minAppVersion` bumped from 1.0.0 → 1.7.2 (matches `Workspace.revealLeaf` requirement); plugin display name normalised to "HWPX writer".
- **Popout window safety**: `setTimeout` in modals replaced with `contentEl.win.setTimeout`; `MeasureText` uses `activeDocument` for canvas creation and gates on `Platform.isDesktopApp`.
- **No-op promises removed**: `openInHancom` is now sync (the underlying `fs.writeFileSync` was already blocking, `shell.openPath` is fire-and-forget).

## Verification
- `npx eslint src/` — 0 errors, 0 warnings
- `npm run build` — clean (`main.js` 407 KB)
- `npm test` — 14 files / 85 tests passed
releases.name: 0.2.2 — Community plugin review fixes

releases.author: JunDamin
releases.description:
## Review preparation cleanup

Proactively addresses common Obsidian community plugin review feedback.

### Changes
- Added central `log` helper (`src/logger.ts`) — debug/info calls silent in production unless `localStorage.hwpx-writer-debug = "1"`
- Replaced all 47 `console.log`/`console.info` calls across the plugin with the central helper
- Removed `innerHTML` usage in favor of safer DOM APIs (`DOMParser` / `replaceChildren()`) in preview and table border designer
- Version bumped to 0.2.1; 85 tests still passing

No user-facing behavior changes.
releases.name: 0.2.1 — Review prep cleanup

releases.author: JunDamin
releases.description:
First public release of **HWPX Writer** for Obsidian.

## Highlights

- **Markdown → HWPX conversion** (headings, tables, lists, code blocks, blockquotes, inline formatting)
- **Template system**: import styled HWPX, copy its fonts/headings/table styles into plugin settings; bundled md2hwpx 보고양식 sample; save current state as template
- **Live preview** in sidebar (via @rhwp/core WASM)
- **Table border designer**: 7 independent segments × 17 HWPX line types
- **5 built-in presets** (기본, 공문 양식, 학술 논문, 프레젠테이션)
- **YAML frontmatter** overrides for per-document styling
- **Obsidian syntax**: `[[wikilinks]]`, `![[embeds]]`, `> [!callouts]`, `==highlights==`
- **85 automated tests** (golden file, ZIP invariants, parser regression, template integration)

## Install

Desktop only. Unzip `main.js`, `manifest.json`, `styles.css` into
\`<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/hwpx-writer/\`, then enable in Settings → Community plugins.

## Known limitations

- Images (\`![alt](url)\`) rendered as \`[이미지: alt]\` placeholder (actual image insertion pending)
- Footnotes (\`[^1]\`) not yet implemented
releases.name: 0.2.0 — First public release
